## Application Details

**Application name:** <!-- e.g. Inkscape -->
**Official website:** <!-- e.g. https://inkscape.org -->
**Latest stable version:** <!-- e.g. 1.3.2 -->
**License:** <!-- e.g. GPL-2.0 -->

## Install methods

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Official `.exe` installer
- [ ] Official `.msi` installer
- [ ] Portable / ZIP
- [ ] winget — ID: <!-- e.g. Inkscape.Inkscape -->
- [ ] Chocolatey — ID: <!-- e.g. inkscape -->
- [ ] Scoop — ID: <!-- e.g. inkscape -->

## Why should it be added?

<!-- What makes this app useful to sysadmins or automation developers?
     Does it store meaningful settings in the registry?
     Is it commonly deployed in enterprise environments? -->

## What I already know about its registry footprint

<!-- Optional: if you've checked regedit after installing, list what you found -->

```
HKXX\Software\Vendor\AppName
  KeyName = "value"
```

## Can you contribute the doc yourself?

- [ ] Yes — I'll open a PR following the [CONTRIBUTING guide](https://github.com/samibs/Registry-Keys-for-Open-Source-Applications-on-Windows/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No — I'm requesting someone else document it
